name: Gary Glitter

acts.description: Convicted in Vietnam of committing obscene acts with girls aged 10 and 11
UK conviction for downloading 4,000 images of child abuse including Category A material
UK 2015 conviction for sexual offences against girls aged 8–13 during 1970s glam rock era

behavior_summary: Multiple convictions for child sexual abuse across multiple countries. Not an allegation — a sustained, proven pattern of predation against children as young as eight.

notable_works: I'm the Leader of the Gang
art.summary: 1970s glam rock figure whose songs became ubiquitous sports anthems. Musically unremarkable beyond their cultural footprint.

accountability_events: 1999 convicted in UK for child pornography
2006 convicted in Vietnam for child abuse
2015 convicted in UK of historic child sex offences, sentenced to 16 years

verdict.blurb: Rock and Roll Part 2 plays at every sports stadium in America while its author serves a 16-year sentence for raping children as young as eight. There is genuinely no reason to ever play this song again. None.
